query:
SELECT id, googleUserEmail, customerId, customerName, currency, timezone, isActive, syncError, lastSyncedAt, createdAt 
FROM google_ad_accounts 
WHERE isActive = 1
ORDER BY id DESC 
LIMIT 1;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user KKo9odT1HVTXECY.26f2cde391d3 --database jX4Ppf2KXZ8z9Tppipem7T --execute
